# Automated Workflow LLC

> Spreadsheet cleanup, Google Sheets automation, and AI-written recurring business reports for small businesses. Based in Gainesville, FL; works remotely with clients across the US. Flat prices, 24–48h cleanup turnaround, and a free 1-day mini-demo on your real data — you keep the demo either way.

Contact: colin@automatedworkflowllc.com · +1-703-939-1174 · https://automatedworkflowllc.com

## Services and pricing

- Spreadsheet Cleanup: from $40 (small files); most jobs $150–300 flat. Duplicates removed, formats fixed, formulas repaired. 24–48 hour turnaround. Excel and Google Sheets.
- Automated Dashboard: $650 flat. Live, self-updating KPI dashboard in Google Sheets with an AI-written weekly summary note.
- Report Autopilot (flagship): $1,000 one-time setup, then $250–500/mo monitoring. Recurring reports write themselves — pulled, formatted, summarized in plain English, delivered on schedule and on demand.
- Full Workflow Automation: from $2,000. Intake, tracking, reporting, and follow-ups built end to end.
- Free 1-day mini-demo: send one messy file, get a working fix back within a day, keep it either way.

## Pages

- [Home](https://automatedworkflowllc.com/): services, pricing, live sample dashboards, FAQ, contact.

## Notes for agents

- The founder, Colin McCarthy, answers his own email and phone.
- Live sample dashboards are linked from the home page and are viewable without login.
- Service area: United States (remote); local presence in Gainesville, Florida.
